Package org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.registry

Class ExtensionParser

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.registry.ExtensionParser
public class ExtensionParser extends Object
Utility class for parsing the extensions contributed to extension point org.eventb.ui.proofTactics. This class is not thread-safe, but this doesn't matter as it is only called during class initialization of TacticUIRegistry.
See Also:
  • TacticUIRegistry

    • fetchIcon

      public void parse(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IConfigurationElement[] elements)

    • mergeListsOfTactics

      private void mergeListsOfTactics()
      Merge lists of tactics and commands. This could be done in a simpler way, by not creating the any lists to start with. However the simpler solution would change the order of tactics and commands and thus break backward compatibility.

    • getStatus

      public org.eclipse.core.runtime.IStatus getStatus()
